qa_pairs.question: What is the purpose of cloudInit when launching a virtual machine (VM) instance?
qa_pairs.answer: cloudInit is used to customize a VM instance the first time it is launched.

qa_pairs.question: What are the available methods for utilizing cloudInit to customize a VM instance?
qa_pairs.answer: cloudInit can be used to customize a VM instance either via the OpenStack command-line interface or by pasting a cloudInit script into the 'Customization Script' field of the OpenStack dashboard, found under the 'Configuration' option when launching an instance (Project-->Compute-->Instances-->Launch instance).

qa_pairs.question: Can cloudInit be used to add users to a virtual machine during its initial creation?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, cloudInit can be used to add users during the creation of a virtual machine.
